info.title: Traigent Economics Telemetry Routes
info.description: Planned tenant-scoped economics telemetry ingestion. Contract-first: this route is published here before TraigentBackend ingestion and SDK emission exist, per the workspace rule that request/response shapes start in TraigentSchema. It is NOT asserted against backend parity.

post.summary: Ingest a batch of economics telemetry events
post.description: Accepts one idempotent batch of exposure-funnel events, run-economics records, and machine-verifiable receipts. Idempotent: replaying a batch with the same Idempotency-Key returns the original result (200) instead of re-applying it; a first ingest returns 201.

200.description: Batch replayed — this idempotency key was already ingested; no new state was written. The body binds replayed=true (replay response schema), so status and flag cannot disagree.

201.description: Batch ingested — state written now. Individual events may still have been rejected; read counts and rejections. The body binds replayed=false (initial response schema).

400.description: Malformed batch, unknown contract/version, or malformed idempotency key.

403.description: Insufficient permission to submit economics telemetry for this scope.

409.description: Idempotency conflict — the same key was submitted with a different body. Stored events are immutable and are never overwritten.

422.description: Every event in the batch was rejected.

post.x-wrap-status: unclassified — economics telemetry is not in the #136 wrap-map; the documented response is the bare ingest-result shape. Reconcile envelope status when backend ingestion lands.
post.x-traigent-note: Tenant scoping is resolved from the authenticated request context. The contract carries no tenant field precisely so a client cannot assert one.
